name: research_ethics_satellite_derived_southport_tru_loy
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics satellite derived southport tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Jonah Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Jonah Ishikawa, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Keisha Vasquez, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Jonah Ishikawa must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Jonah Ishikawa do?
